heading: Contingency planning: sealift and related intermodal transportation requirements
label: 2631a Contingency planning: sealift and related intermodal transportation requirements

children.heading: .—Consideration of Private Capabilities
children.label: a .—Consideration of Private Capabilities
children.text: The Secretary of Defense shall ensure that all studies and reports of the Department of Defense, and all actions taken in the Department of Defense, concerning sealift and related intermodal transportation requirements take into consideration the full range of the transportation and distribution capabilities that are available from operators of privately owned United States flag merchant vessels.

children.heading: .—Private Capacities Presentations
children.label: b .—Private Capacities Presentations
children.text: The Secretary shall afford each operator of a vessel referred to in subsection (a), not less often than annually, an opportunity to present to the Department of Defense information on its port-to-port and intermodal transportation capacities.
